case_title: HODGE, DORIENNE VS THE UNITED COUNCIL OF HUMAN SERVICES et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-07-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-06-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HODGE, DORIENNE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE UNITED COUNCIL OF HUMAN SERVICES JENNINGS, TAFT PLAINTIFF DID NOT SUSTAIN HER BURDEN OF PROOF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
